body:
This release brings a nice quality-of-life improvement to task execution along with a solid batch of bug fixes across several subsystems.

### Highlights

- **Real-time streaming for keep-order tasks** — The `keep_order` task output mode now streams the active task's output in real-time instead of buffering everything until completion. Other parallel tasks buffer quietly and flush in definition order as they finish, so you get live feedback without sacrificing deterministic output ordering. [#8164](https://github.com/jdx/mise/pull/8164)

- **npm backend performance** — `npm view` is now called only once per package lookup instead of multiple times, speeding up npm-based tool resolution. Thanks @risu729! [#8181](https://github.com/jdx/mise/pull/8181)

### Bug Fixes

- **Recursive shim execution on Windows** — `mise exec` now strips the shims directory from PATH during executable lookup, preventing infinite recursion when shims call back into `mise x`. [#8189](https://github.com/jdx/mise/pull/8189)
- **PATH reordering after activation** — `hook-env` now preserves any PATH reordering done after `mise activate` (e.g., by `~/.zlogin`), instead of silently reverting to the original order. [#8190](https://github.com/jdx/mise/pull/8190)
- **Cross-platform lockfile resolution** — The aqua backend now correctly resolves lockfile artifacts for the target platform instead of leaking host-specific overrides into `mise lock --platform`. Thanks @mackwic! [#8183](https://github.com/jdx/mise/pull/8183)
- **Version alias lockfile lookup** — Version aliases (like `lts`) are now resolved before lockfile lookup, so locked versions are matched correctly. [#8194](https://github.com/jdx/mise/pull/8194)
- **Task source freshness checks** — Freshness checks now work correctly with dynamic task directories. Thanks @rooperuu! [#8169](https://github.com/jdx/mise/pull/8169)
- **Global tasks in monorepos** — Global tasks are now properly resolved when running from a monorepo root. [#8192](https://github.com/jdx/mise/pull/8192)
- **Wildcard glob matching** — `test:*` no longer incorrectly matches the parent `test` task. [#8165](https://github.com/jdx/mise/pull/8165)
- **task_config.includes paths** — Include paths in task config are now resolved relative to the config root, not the working directory. [#8193](https://github.com/jdx/mise/pull/8193)
- **Upgrade safety** — `mise upgrade` now skips untrusted tracked configs instead of failing. [#8195](https://github.com/jdx/mise/pull/8195)
- **helm-diff registry entry** — Fixed the archive binary name for helm-diff. Thanks @jean-humann! [#8173](https://github.com/jdx/mise/pull/8173)

### New Contributors

Welcome @jean-humann, @mackwic, and @rooperuu!

### 📦 Aqua Registry Updates

#### New Packages (2)

- [`BetterDiscord/cli`](https://github.com/BetterDiscord/cli)
- [`glossia.ai/cli`](https://github.com/glossia.ai/cli)
name: v2026.2.15: Streaming in Order
